title: Stars Await Us
overview: A man is released from prison and saved by his roommates after a suicide attempt. When he visits a bar and sees a Russian woman performing the classic song "Blue Train," he is inspired to go off in search of his ex-girlfriend.

trailers.title: STARS AWAIT US Teaser | PÖFF 2020
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
